_comment: Canonical evidence store (see resume-system-architecture.md, Layers 1-3). Human-editable: each unit is one grounded claim; set tier to pinned/banned to force a unit in or out. Repo-level overrides live in curation.json.

units.claim: Built the flagship Daily Brief agent (Python/FastAPI) — an agentic orchestration loop over Email, Calendar, and Exa AI web-search tools via asyncio.
Architected a multi-tier memory system (working/medium/long-term) on MongoDB and Redis.
Built an LLM evaluation pipeline with promptfoo benchmarking 8+ models (Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, Grok) on tool-calling, memory, and latency.
Cut routing-LLM token usage by 82% via artifact-based prompting and context deduplication.
Implemented Langfuse observability for LLM traces, latency, and cost.
Implemented CASA security standards by building token denylists in Redis and sanitizing injection vectors to make the system enterprise-ready.
Developed CircuitSynth, fine-tuning Qwen 4B/8B with LoRA/QLoRA to generate executable Arduino circuit JSONs.
units.seniority_signal: Tackled a problem where standard models like ChatGPT completely fail, demonstrating advanced problem-solving as a Research Intern.

units.claim: Achieved 75% accuracy (vs ~0% for base GPT models) via a multi-stage RAG pipeline with automated validation.
Ran quantized GGUF models on Raspberry Pi for edge deployment.
Full-stack campus ERP platform grown to 10,000+ active users.
React Native mobile client, Node.js/Express REST API, MongoDB, Next.js web app.
JWT auth with RBAC, rate limiting, Socket.io real-time sync, 99.9% uptime.
Zero-cost Vercel-hosted backend handling 150k+ monthly API requests at sub-100ms latency.
Contributed 12 merged PRs to mastra-ai/mastra (25k+ stars) across the core agent runtime, streaming, ai-sdk, and Studio.
cal.com (46k+ stars): full BigBlueButton video integration — 912 LOC, 32 unit tests.
n8n (195k+ stars): Webhook CSP security fix and a cross-platform build-path fix.
Turns incoming Gmail into live AI cards via Gmail watch → Pub/Sub → durable worker queue → Gemini.
Async web ingestion + semantic search with load-balanced FastAPI replicas and a Next.js 15 frontend.
Intent-routing e-commerce chatbot across microservices with Pinecone-backed RAG.
shipped production agents at AiRA
scaled a campus platform to 10,000+ users
fine-tuned multimodal LLMs to 75% accuracy
150k+ monthly API requests at sub-100ms latency
Built a service that transforms incoming Gmail messages into AI-generated cards, each with a headline, summary, illustration, and voice narration.
Developed a production-style RAG engine featuring asynchronous web ingestion, semantic search, and AI answers, served by load-balanced FastAPI replicas with a Next.js 15 frontend.
units.seniority_signal: Designed a production-style, load-balanced system architecture.

units.claim: Contributed 21 pull requests (12 merged) to the popular open-source project mastra-ai/mastra.
units.seniority_signal: Sustained contributions to a major open-source project.

units.claim: Fixed an issue to preserve Cloudflare execution context through a custom-route bridge.
Implemented a warning and block in an AI playground for agents that reference unpublished prompt blocks.
Fixed a bug in a React component to keep interleaved text and tool calls in order while streaming.
Added a feature to an AI playground's Studio to display experiment names and descriptions.
Fixed a Daytona integration to correctly pass the '--only-dir' flag to gcsfuse when a GCS prefix is set.
Fixed a bug in an AI playground to ensure code-agent instructions respect editor configuration locks.
Contributed to the open-source TejasMishr/ERP_Client project by implementing and enhancing an attendance tracking feature for students and faculty.

Fixed the file structure for the mmmut-xyz/server.mmmut.xyz project.
Contributed to the open-source project TejasMishr/erp.mmmut.xyz by updating attendance routes, controllers, and model schemas.
Contributed a total of 6 merged pull requests across three open-source projects: TejasMishr/MMMUTRESO (3), TejasMishr/MMMUT_Erp (2), and TejasMishr/ERP_FRONT (1).
Added a carousel component to the TejasMishr/MMMUTRESO project.
Applied CSS for the team page in the TejasMishr/MMMUTRESO project.
Updated the navbar and hero page for the TejasMishr/MMMUTRESO project.
Refactored the file structure for the TejasMishr/MMMUT_Erp project.
Resolved a deployment issue in the GDG-MMMUT-Website open-source project.
Fixed a metadata issue in the layout.tsx file for the open-source project Taransh121/Travel-Startup.
Contributed a 'Navbar' feature to the open-source project Vatsalmadhur/gdsc23.
Contributed to the open-source project madhurgaur/abhyudayafest with one merged pull request.
Fixed a bug in the Formbricks open-source project where the navigation bar was not properly visible in Dark Mode.
Proposed a fix for the Booker component in cal.com to allow users to return to the current month after an automatic date advance.
units.seniority_signal: Contributed to a popular open-source project (cal.com).
